results.AI Prompt Keywords: Create an OLED-optimized dark interface with deep black (#000000), dark grey (#121212), midnight blue accents. Use minimal glow effects, vibrant neon accents (green, blue, gold, purple), high contrast text. Optimize for eye comfort and OLED power saving.
results.Best For: Night-mode apps, coding platforms, entertainment, eye-strain prevention, OLED devices, low-light
results.CSS/Technical Keywords: background: #000000 or #121212, color: #FFFFFF or #E0E0E0, text-shadow: 0 0 10px neon-color (sparingly), filter: brightness(0.8) if needed, color-scheme: dark
results.Effects & Animation: Minimal glow (text-shadow: 0 0 10px), dark-to-light transitions, low white emission, high readability, visible focus
results.Implementation Checklist: ☐ Deep black #000000 or #121212, ☐ Vibrant neon accents used, ☐ Text contrast 7:1+, ☐ Minimal glow effects, ☐ OLED power optimization, ☐ No white (#FFFFFF) background
results.Keywords: Dark theme, low light, high contrast, deep black, midnight blue, eye-friendly, OLED, night mode, power efficient
results.Primary Colors: Deep Black #000000, Dark Grey #121212, Midnight Blue #0A0E27

results.AI Prompt Keywords: Design a cinematic dark mobile app. Background: LinearGradient from #0a0a0f (top) to #020203 (bottom). Add 2–3 absolute animated 'blob' views: circular, blurRadius 30–50, opacity 0.08–0.12, slow Reanimated oscillation. Cards: borderRadius 16, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08) hairline, subtle top-edge shine gradient. Primary button: #5E6AD2, scale press 0.97, haptic on press. BlurView (intensity 20, tint dark) for tab bar and headers. Typography: Inter 700 for headers, 400 for body. Never use pure #000000. Accent glow: rgba(94,106,210,0.2) behind primary actions.
results.Accessibility: ⚠ WCAG AA (requires careful accent contrast check)
results.Best For: Developer tools, pro productivity apps, fintech/trading dashboards, media/streaming platforms, AI tool interfaces, high-end gaming companion apps
results.CSS/Technical Keywords: borderRadius: 16 (cards/buttons), background: LinearGradient #0a0a0f→#020203, border: StyleSheet.hairlineWidth rgba(255,255,255,0.08), BlurView intensity={20} tint='dark', useAnimatedStyle + withRepeat (blob oscillation), Easing.bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), withSpring damping:20 stiffness:90, Haptics.impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light), scale: 0.97 press
results.Effects & Animation: Expo.out Bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) easing; spring modals (damping:20 stiffness:90); haptic-linked press (Impact Light/Medium); animated ambient light blobs (Reanimated translateX/Y slow oscillation); BlurView glassmorphism headers/nav (intensity 20); scale press 0.97 → 1.0; avoid pure #000000 (OLED smear)
results.Implementation Checklist: ☐ No pure #000000 backgrounds, ☐ LinearGradient base screen, ☐ Animated ambient blobs (Reanimated, native driver), ☐ BlurView on tab bar and headers, ☐ borderRadius 16 on all cards, ☐ Haptic feedback on every Pressable, ☐ Bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1) easing used, ☐ Accent glow behind primary button, ☐ No solid grey borders (rgba only), ☐ Bottom sheets replace all modals
results.Keywords: dark mode, cinematic, ambient light, glassmorphism, deep black, indigo, glow, blur, atmospheric, reanimated, haptic, premium, layered, frosted glass, linear gradient

results.AI Prompt Keywords: Design a cyberpunk interface. Use: neon colors on dark (#0D0D0D), terminal/HUD aesthetic, glitch effects, scanlines overlay, matrix green accents, monospace fonts, angular shapes, dystopian tech feel.
results.Best For: Gaming platforms, tech products, crypto apps, sci-fi applications, developer tools, entertainment
results.CSS/Technical Keywords: background: #0D0D0D, color: #00FF00 or #FF00FF, font-family: monospace, text-shadow: 0 0 10px neon, animation: glitch (transform skew), ::before scanlines (repeating-linear-gradient)
results.Effects & Animation: Neon glow (text-shadow), glitch animations (skew/offset), scanlines (::before overlay), terminal fonts
results.Implementation Checklist: ☐ Dark background only, ☐ Neon accents visible, ☐ Glitch effect subtle, ☐ Scanlines optional, ☐ Monospace font, ☐ Terminal aesthetic
results.Keywords: Neon, dark mode, terminal, HUD, sci-fi, glitch, dystopian, futuristic, matrix, tech noir
